name: Pancakes
rating: Whisk ingredients together. Cook on a hot griddle until bubbles form. Flip and cook until golden brown.

name: Chicken Caesar Salad
rating: Grill chicken until cooked through and slice. Chop lettuce and toss with croutons dressing and chicken.

name: Spaghetti Bolognese
column8: Boil pasta. Brown minced beef with chopped onion and garlic. Add tomatoes and simmer. Pour over pasta.
